items.title: Palestinians say new Israeli measures in West Bank amount to de facto annexation
items.description: The measures aim to increase Israeli control over the occupied West Bank in terms of property law, planning, licensing and enforcement.

items.title: Canadian mining firm says its abducted workers found dead in Mexico
items.description: Vizsla Silver Corp says that family members of some of the kidnapped workers have informed the company that their relatives were found dead.

items.title: Norway police investigate diplomat over Epstein links
items.description: Mona Juul and her husband Terje Rød-Larsen - who played a vital role in the Oslo Accords - are being investigated for "aggravated corruption".

items.title: Machine guns to machetes: Weapons that massacred thousands in Iran
items.description: BBC News Persian Forensic has been able to confirm the security forces' deployment of a wide array of lethal and non-lethal weaponry.

items.title: Maxwell refuses to answer questions about Epstein in congressional hearing
items.description: Ghislaine Maxwell, the jailed associate of sex offender Jeffrey Epstein, invoked her Fifth Amendment right to avoid self-incrimination.
